summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for IAD Airport Limo luxury limousine website. All navigation links, dropdown menus, page routes, and buttons are working correctly. The site displays a professional dark theme with gold accents consistent across all 25+ pages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All navigation and pages tested and working. Site is a static frontend-only luxury limousine service website with professional design.

tests_passed.homepage: Hero section loads correctly with View Fleet and Get a Quote buttons

navbar_dropdowns.vehicles_dropdown: Shows Sedans, SUV, Vans/Sprinters categories with vehicle links
navbar_dropdowns.why_choose_dropdown: All 4 items work (Safety, Drivers, Technology, Worldwide)
navbar_dropdowns.our_company_dropdown: About Us and Contact links work

other_pages.login: /login - has email, password inputs and submit button
other_pages.book_now: /book-now - shows booking form with date/time pickers

tests_passed.mobile_responsive: Mobile menu button present and viewport adapts correctly
